name: trace
description: | Use when encountering bugs, test failures, runtime errors, broken builds, or "this doesn't work" reports. Systematic root-cause analysis before any patch — never blind-patches symptoms. Standalone, ends with thinking-tier review of the fix. Trigger with /hyperflow:trace, "debug this", "find the root cause", "why is this failing", "this test is broken".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 遇到 bug、测试失败或构建报错时，先做系统化的根因分析再动手修，避免头痛医头式打补丁，修完还会复盘检查修复方案。
